Superstore Data sets.

Select Order_ID, Order_Date,Customer_Id,Customer_Name,Segment,Sales,Country 
from Superstore_Practice 
where order_Id = 'CA-2016-104941';

2nd Result

select Customer_Id,Sum(sales) as "Total_Sales"  from superstore_practice
group by Customer_Id
order by Total_sales;

----------------
inner join
--------inner joins -------

select department,Employee_name, gendor from harsit
inner join happy
on harsit.employee_id = happy.employee_id;

Eng.                	Rohit                         	Male      
Dr.                 	Vikram                        	Male      
Adv                 	Roshni                        	Female    

-------Left Join-----

select * from harsit as H
left join happy as Y
on H.employee_Id = Y. Employee_Id;

2	Rohit                         	Male      	2	Eng.                	Noida                         
4	Vinay                         	Male      	NULL	NULL	NULL
6	Vikram                        	Male      	6	Dr.                 	Goa                           
8	Roshni                        	Female    	8	Adv                 	Patna                         
10	Sweta                         	Female    	NULL	NULL	NULL


------Right Join-----

select * from Happy as [Happy Table]
Right join harsit as [Harsit Table]
on [Happy Table].Employee_Id = [Harsit Table].employee_Id;

2	Eng.                	Noida                         	2	Rohit                         	Male      
NULL	NULL	NULL	4	Vinay                         	Male      
6	Dr.                 	Goa                           	6	Vikram                        	Male      
8	Adv                 	Patna                         	8	Roshni                        	Female    
NULL	NULL	NULL	10	Sweta                         	Female    



select * from happy;
select * from harsit;
